lanes.label: First-Line Viewpoints Skill

incidents.needed_action: run the local follow-builders skill publisher and inspect the generated publish report
repair the owning Guanlan skill metadata, evals, examples, registry, or .skill-store mirror

records.summary: Separated read-only audit from explicit repair, added dashboard semantic validation, fixed direct rebuild and daily repair wiring, and serialized Community Intelligence publication.
risks: pre-existing uncommitted Community Intelligence skill mirror drift remains intentionally unsynchronized
lessons: audit commands must never mutate before measuring drift
generated dashboards need an independent contract at every reachable producer
concurrency keys must identify the shared output
reusable_rules: keep audit and repair commands separate
run dashboard contract after every rebuild
do not sync dirty unrelated skills

records.summary: Closed Standards and Spec review gaps: moved the contract into the producer, widened safe repair ownership, recursively blocked personal paths, fixed private delete resolution, serialized publication, and regenerated the dashboard from clean inputs.
checks: clean-input dashboard contract passed for 155 skills
issues: same-date publication could use different locks
dirty workspace drift leaked into generated dashboard
risks: local Community Intelligence edits remain unsynchronized and are correctly reported by read-only audit
lessons: public display paths must never be reused as private filesystem authority
generated artifacts must come from committed inputs
contracts belong in the producer boundary
reusable_rules: resolve destructive targets from validated identifiers and private roots
use one lock per shared writer
validate clean generated artifacts separately from dirty local diagnostics

records.summary: Made dashboard publication atomic, prevented drift-only safe rebuilds, aligned deletion with GUANLAN_SKILL_STORE, and expanded cross-platform personal path detection.
checks: clean-input dashboard contract passed for 155 skills
issues: custom store deletion used default home
root and WSL personal paths escaped detection
risks: Windows full-worktree validation is blocked by an existing overlong Signal Card filename; targeted clean-input contract validation passed
lessons: validate candidates before replacing previous-good artifacts
safe repair must distinguish generated staleness from source drift
all consumers must share the configured private root
reusable_rules: publish generated data atomically after contract success
never rebuild public state for mirror-only drift
honor GUANLAN_SKILL_STORE across build check sync and delete

records.summary: Separated explicit drift sync from generated rebuild and hardened custom Store deletion roots, trash ownership, skill markers, and exact-home path redaction.
checks: clean-input dashboard contract passed for 155 skills
issues: filesystem root could be configured as Store
risks: none in committed scope; unrelated local lane files remain unstaged
lessons: destructive roots must reject filesystem root and home
trash should share the Store filesystem
explicit authorization needs its own reachable branch
reusable_rules: sync only with explicit opt-in and observed drift
require SKILL.md before moving a Store entry
keep trash beside custom Store

records.action: Skill Ops final path and mixed-error closure
records.summary: Closed mixed semantic-error plus drift repair, canonicalized destructive roots, and moved hidden trash inside the Store filesystem.
issues: sibling trash could cross mount boundaries
lessons: classify mirror-only errors separately from semantic contract errors
destructive roots require canonical identity checks
reusable_rules: canonicalize configured roots before safety comparison
keep trash inside its owning Store
rebuild mixed semantic failures without implicitly syncing drift

records.summary: Reused the same-date Raw/Pool artifact, repaired truncated source-title recovery, enforced DeepSeek-only title provenance, removed duplicated card facts, expanded entity aliases, rebuilt and gated the 2026-07-18 V4 publication.
lessons: Recover a complete captured source headline before title translation
Do not publish title-derived facts when no independent source span exists
reusable_rules: Only DeepSeek or manual-reviewed source-title translations may enter the compatibility registry

records.summary: Built and audited an evidence-backed daily, weekly, and monthly factual change explorer as an independent Application Center column.
lessons: Compare calendar periods only across equal observed batch windows
Use verified RELATION-V2 serves evidence for product entering use
reusable_rules: Trend Radar is a downstream factual projection and cannot block canonical V4 persistence
Every structural item resolves to events and original sources
